test_name: May 2024 International Form C SAT Math Module 2
passage: The number of bacteria in a population doubles every hour. The function f(t)=28,000(2) t gives the number of bacteria in the population, where represents the time, in hours, after the initial measurement. Which is the best interpretation of 28,000 in this context?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The number of bacteria in the population at the initial measurement

choices.label: B
choices.text: The number of hours it takes for the number of bacteria in the population to double

choices.label: C
choices.text: The number of bacteria in the population hour after the initial measurement

choices.label: D
choices.text: The number of times the number of bacteria in the population doubles in hour
